creator: mckusick@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #10)
If there is an easy way to create 10Gb images in addition to the 30Gb images for the folks that want to use 10Gb images on the cloud, then that would be my first choice.

Otherwise, I would be in favor of having you reduce the 30Gb image size to 27Gb as that should still give us several years of growth. And hopefully by the time growth is needed, the size of the "free" VMs will also have increased.
